name: BankAmericard Credit Card
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, and a genuinely long 21-cycle 0% intro APR window

verdict.text: No rewards at all: only for the 21-cycle 0% intro APR

earn_note: BankAmericard isn't a rewards card. It's built entirely around a long 0% intro APR window and no penalty APR. There's no everyday earn rate of any kind.

points.note: Nothing to redeem. The entire value proposition is the intro APR window, not earning.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards program, nothing to transfer.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: No purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide published for this card; it's positioned purely as a low-interest/balance-transfer product.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers (within 60 days) for the first 21 billing cycles, then 14.99%–25.99% variable, one of the longest 0% windows available.

services.name: Balance transfer fee
services.detail: 5% of each transfer amount, with no reduced introductory rate on transfers for this card.

services.name: No penalty APR
services.detail: A late payment won't automatically raise your interest rate, unlike many competing cards.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Shares the same 0% intro APR window

additional_cards.note: No cost to add, mainly useful for spreading balance-transfer or large-purchase spend across the household during the 21-month 0% window.
